summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kaelra Pass 3 features. All backend APIs and frontend components working correctly. Entity command router successfully handles local navigation commands without LLM calls. Microsoft OAuth correctly shows as not configured (EXPECTED). Google OAuth configured. Location timeline and memory consolidation working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/chat/stream with non-actionable message returns done event
Backend: POST /api/chat/stream with actionable message yields actions event without error
Backend: GET /api/memory/insights returns {total, learned, consolidated, pending_consolidation}
Backend: POST /api/memory/consolidate returns 200 with dict {consolidated, processed, skipped}
Backend: GET /api/oauth/microsoft/status returns configured=false, connected=false, accounts=[] (EXPECTED)
Backend: GET /api/oauth/microsoft/url returns 400 (EXPECTED - not configured)
Backend: GET /api/oauth/google/status returns configured=true with accounts array
Backend: GET /api/oauth/google/accounts returns {accounts: []} structure
Backend: POST /api/location/ping with {lat,lng} returns place/visits dict
Backend: GET /api/location/timeline returns {places, frequent, today_points, today, total_places}
Backend: Cheaper Anthropic model (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) works for action extraction without 500 error
Frontend: Login via demo button (data-testid=auth-demo-login-button) works correctly
Frontend: /timeline route renders with data-testid=timeline-root and timeline-toggle-button
Frontend: /accounts shows google-connect-card and microsoft-connect-card
Frontend: Clicking microsoft-connect-button shows toast 'Microsoft is not configured' (EXPECTED)
Frontend: /memory shows memory-consolidation-panel with memory-insights
Frontend: memory-consolidate-button works without error
Frontend: Global wake-word toggle (kaelra-wakeword-toggle) present on all pages (home, timeline, accounts, memory)
Frontend: Entity command router - 'show me my email' opens email card locally WITHOUT navigating to /talk
Frontend: Entity command router - email card displays as modal overlay on home page
